---
name: 'Question / Help ❓'
about: 'Do you have a question or are you stuck on some part of the project? 🤝'
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

**What are you trying to do?** 🎯
A clear description of your final goal. Ex: "I'm trying to connect sensor X with board Y using library Z..."

**What have you already tried?** 🔄
Describe the steps you have already taken and where exactly you got stuck. This helps prevent people from suggesting things you've already done.

**Relevant code or error log** 💻
Paste the relevant code snippets or error messages here (use code blocks with \`\`\`).

**Additional context** 📌
Add any other useful information here, such as:

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Tool versions: [e.g. Python 3.10, ESP-IDF v5]
